thought.text: LLVM 18 doesn't have `getPointerElementType`. Let me fix properly

reasoning_content: `getPointerElementType` doesn't exist in LLVM 18 (opaque pointers). Let me use a different approach - get the function type from the Function object itself.

action.command:
cd /workspace/YatCC && python3 -c "
content = open('task/3/EmitIR.cpp').read()
old = '''  // Get function type from the head value's LLVM type
  auto fty = llvm::dyn_cast<llvm::FunctionType>(
    llvm::cast<llvm::PointerType>(head->getType())->getPointerElementType());'''
new = '''  // Get function type from the LLVM Function object
  auto func = llvm::dyn_cast<llvm::Function>(head);
  auto fty = func ? func->getFunctionType() 
    : llvm::dyn_cast<llvm::FunctionType>(self(obj->head->type));'''
content = content.replace(old, new)
open('task/3/EmitIR.cpp', 'w').write(content)
print('Fixed')
"
